status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
alternate_names: Siemens Product Computer Emergency Response Team
notes: Siemens is a multinational technology conglomerate. Siemens ProductCERT publishes security advisories (SSA - Siemens Security Advisories) in CSAF format covering Siemens industrial products including SIMATIC, SINEMA, SCALANCE, and other automation and control systems. Siemens is one of the largest ICS/OT security advisory publishers.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format. Siemens Security Advisories (SSA) cover a wide range of industrial automation and control products.
